ucs.title: [LLM] VOID MANTICORE / Homeland Justice wiper chain (BiBi, No-Justice/LowEraser, Cl Wiper) with recovery sabotage
ucs.description: Hunts the destructive endgame VOID MANTICORE (MOIS, aka BANISHED KITTEN / Storm-0842 / Red Sandstorm) runs after access via SharePoint/Confluence — back-to-back execution of their bespoke wiper families (BiBi-Windows/BiBi-Linux, No-Justice/LowEraser corrupting EFI bootloader, Cl Wiper/CHIMNEYSWEEP, Karma) alongside shadow copy / boot config / event log destruction used in Albania (Homeland Justice) and Israel (Handala Hack) operations.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdlines values(Processes.process_name) as procs values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parents from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name IN ("vssadmin.exe","wmic.exe","bcdedit.exe","wevtutil.exe","fsutil.exe","cipher.exe","diskpart.exe") AND (Processes.process="*delete shadows*" OR Processes.process="*shadowcopy delete*" OR Processes.process="*bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures*" OR Processes.process="*recoveryenabled no*" OR Processes.process="*usn deletejournal*" OR Processes.process="*cl System*" OR Processes.process="*cl Security*" OR Processes.process="*cl Application*")) OR (Processes.process IN ("*BiBi*","*No-Justice*","*NoJustice*","*LowEraser*","*EfiBackup*","*Cl-Wiper*","*ClWiper*","*CHIMNEYSWEEP*","*KarmaLoader*","*Lionhead*","*PartialRansom*","*KhonsuLeaks*","*HomelandJustice*")) by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process_name _time span=1h | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | stats dc(process_name) as distinct_tools values(procs) as tooling values(cmdlines) as cmds min(firstTime) as firstTime max(lastTime) as lastTime by dest user | where distinct_tools >= 2 | append [| tstats summariesonly=true count from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where (Filesystem.file_name="*.BiBi*" OR Filesystem.file_name="BiBi-Windows.exe" OR Filesystem.file_name="BiBi-Linux.out" OR Filesystem.file_name="NACL.exe" OR Filesystem.file_name="EfiBackup.exe" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\EFI\\Microsoft\\Boot\\bootmgfw.efi.bak") by Filesystem.dest Filesystem.file_name Filesystem.file_path | `drop_dm_object_name(Filesystem)`] | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
let wiperBins = dynamic(["BiBi","BiBi-Windows.exe","BiBi-Linux.out","No-Justice","NoJustice","NACL","LowEraser","EfiBackup","Cl-Wiper","ClWiper","CHIMNEYSWEEP","KarmaLoader","Lionhead","PartialRansom","KhonsuLeaks","HomelandJustice","Handala"]);
let recoveryAbuse = DeviceProcessEvents
  | where Timestamp > ago(14d)
  | where FileName in~ ("vssadmin.exe","wmic.exe","bcdedit.exe","wevtutil.exe","fsutil.exe","cipher.exe","diskpart.exe")
  | where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("delete shadows","shadowcopy delete","bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures","recoveryenabled no","usn deletejournal","cl System","cl Security","cl Application")
  | project Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessFileName;
let wiperExec = DeviceProcessEvents
  | where Timestamp > ago(14d)
  | where FileName has_any (wiperBins) or ProcessCommandLine has_any (wiperBins) or InitiatingProcessFileName has_any (wiperBins);
let efiTamper = DeviceFileEvents
  | where Timestamp > ago(14d)
  | where FolderPath has_any (@"\EFI\Microsoft\Boot\", @"\System Volume Information\") and (FileName endswith ".efi.bak" or FileName has_any (wiperBins))
  | project Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, ActionType, FolderPath, FileName, InitiatingProcessFileName;
union recoveryAbuse, wiperExec, efiTamper
| summarize EventCount = count(), DistinctTools = dcount(FileName), Tooling = make_set(FileName, 20), Commands = make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 20), Folders = make_set(FolderPath, 20), FirstSeen = min(Timestamp), LastSeen = max(Timestamp) by DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName
| where DistinctTools >= 2 or Tooling has_any (wiperBins)
| order by LastSeen desc
ucs.rationale: VOID MANTICORE is uniquely identified by chained custom wipers — BiBi (Israel/Handala persona), No-Justice/LowEraser (Albania/Homeland Justice, which uniquely zeros the EFI bootloader and renames bootmgfw.efi to .bak), and Cl Wiper/CHIMNEYSWEEP — paired with a fixed pre-wipe routine of vssadmin/wmic shadow deletion, bcdedit recovery disable, and wevtutil event log clearing. Generic ransomware also

ucs.title: [LLM] VOID MANTICORE / COBALT MYSTIQUE handoff: SharePoint/Confluence webshell to internal recon and hack-and-leak staging
ucs.description: Hunts VOID MANTICORE's signature initial-access-to-staging chain that precedes the public COBALT MYSTIQUE leak persona: exploitation of internet-facing Microsoft SharePoint (CVE-2019-0604) or Atlassian Confluence (CVE-2022-26134), w3wp.exe spawning cmd/PowerShell, Karma/Lionhead-style enumeration, and bulk archiving of mailboxes/file shares for the Telegram leak channels (Handala, Karma, KhonsuLeaks).
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdlines values(Processes.process_name) as procs from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name IN ("w3wp.exe","tomcat*.exe","java.exe") AND Processes.process_name IN ("cmd.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","powershell_ise.exe","cscript.exe","wscript.exe","certutil.exe","bitsadmin.exe","7z.exe","rar.exe","WinRAR.exe","makecab.exe") by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process_name _time span=1h | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | eval is_recon=if(match(cmdlines,"(?i)(whoami|net\s+user|net\s+group|net\s+localgroup|nltest|Get-ADUser|Get-ADComputer|tasklist|systeminfo|ipconfig|quser|net\s+view|adfind)"),1,0), is_archive=if(match(cmdlines,"(?i)(7z\s+a|rar\s+a|-hp|-mx|makecab|Compress-Archive)"),1,0), is_dump=if(match(cmdlines,"(?i)(comsvcs\.dll|MiniDump|lsass|ntdsutil|reg\s+save\s+hklm\\\\sam)"),1,0) | stats sum(is_recon) as recon_hits sum(is_archive) as archive_hits sum(is_dump) as dump_hits values(procs) as procs values(cmdlines) as cmds min(firstTime) as firstTime max(lastTime) as lastTime by dest user | where (recon_hits>0 AND (archive_hits>0 OR dump_hits>0)) OR dump_hits>1 | join type=left dest [| tstats summariesonly=true count as web_exploit_hits from datamodel=Web where Web.url IN ("*Picker.aspx*","*ItemPicker.aspx*","*/server-info.action*","*/CachedConfigurationAction*","*${*") by Web.dest | rename Web.dest as dest | fields dest web_exploit_hits] | where isnotnull(web_exploit_hits) OR recon_hits >= 3
ucs.kql:
let lookback = 7d;
let exploitedHosts = DeviceProcessEvents
  | where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
  | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe","tomcat9.exe","tomcat10.exe","java.exe")
  | where FileName in~ ("cmd.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","powershell_ise.exe","cscript.exe","wscript.exe","certutil.exe","bitsadmin.exe","7z.exe","rar.exe","winrar.exe","makecab.exe")
  | extend Recon = ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)\b(whoami|net\s+user|net\s+group|net\s+localgroup|nltest|Get-ADUser|Get-ADComputer|tasklist|systeminfo|ipconfig|quser|net\s+view|adfind)\b",
           Archive = ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)(7z\s+a|rar\s+a|\s-hp|\s-mx|makecab|Compress-Archive)",
           CredDump = ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)(comsvcs\.dll.*MiniDump|lsass\.dmp|ntdsutil|reg\s+save\s+hklm\\sam|procdump.*lsass)",
           ToolStage = ProcessCommandLine has_any ("certutil -urlcache","Invoke-WebRequest","DownloadString","bitsadmin /transfer","curl ","wget ")
  | summarize ReconHits=countif(Recon), ArchiveHits=countif(Archive), DumpHits=countif(CredDump), StageHits=countif(ToolStage),
              Commands=make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 25), Tools=make_set(FileName, 15),
              FirstSeen=min(Timestamp), LastSeen=max(Timestamp)
      by DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName, InitiatingProcessFileName
  | where (ReconHits > 0 and (ArchiveHits > 0 or DumpHits > 0 or StageHits > 0)) or DumpHits >= 1;
let exfilNet = DeviceNetworkEvents
  | where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
  | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","7z.exe","rar.exe","winrar.exe","curl.exe")
  | where RemoteUrl has_any ("telegram.org","t.me","transfer.sh","anonfiles","mega.nz","filetransfer.io","gofile.io","send.exploit.in","pastebin.com","ufile.io")
     or RemotePort in (443, 8443) and isnotempty(RemoteIP)
  | summarize ExfilBytes=sum(toint(coalesce(column_ifexists("BytesSent",0),0))), Destinations=make_set(RemoteUrl,10) by DeviceId, DeviceName, InitiatingProcessFileName;
exploitedHosts
| join kind=leftouter exfilNet on DeviceId
| project DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName, InitiatingProcessFileName, ReconHits, ArchiveHits, DumpHits, StageHits, Tools, Commands, Destinations, ExfilBytes, FirstSeen, LastSeen
| order by LastSeen desc
ucs.rationale: VOID MANTICORE's documented playbook (Check Point, May 2024; Palo Alto Unit 42) is exploitation of internet-facing SharePoint via CVE-2019-0604 — the only Iranian cluster that consistently weaponizes IIS w3wp.exe child processes followed by manual Karma/Lionhead enumeration before handing off to the COBALT MYSTIQUE persona for Telegram leaks (Handala, Homeland Justice, KhonsuLeaks). Generic webshe
